summary: Comprehensive testing of K9Command Phase 2 (Time Clock & Scheduling) frontend and backend. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). All 4 Phase 2 frontend pages tested and working correctly.

issues: PIN pad number buttons appear empty/invisible in screenshot - may be a rendering issue with button text color

seed_data_creation: Created test shifts, shift templates, pay periods, and kiosk devices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Time Clock & Scheduling fully tested. All backend APIs working. All frontend pages rendering correctly with proper navigation.

features: GPS clock in/out with location tracking
Live elapsed time display (00:00:XX format)
Break tracking (Start Break / End Break buttons)
Today's time entries list with status icons
Quick stats (Regular Hours, Overtime, Break minutes)
GPS status indicator with refresh button
Dark slate theme with green accents
Weekly calendar view (7-day grid)
Week navigation (Previous/Next buttons)
Shift display with staff name, time, and status badge
Today highlighting with blue border
Summary stats (Shifts This Week, Total Hours, Staff Scheduled)
Swap requests section (My Swap Requests)
Device setup mode (when no device code)
Full kiosk interface with valid device code
Large time display with date
Action selection (Clock In, Clock Out, Start Break, End Break)
6-digit PIN entry with numeric keypad
Staff On Site section
Device name display
Pay period selector with status badge
New Period button
Approve All / Lock Period workflow
Export Summary / Export Detail buttons
Summary stats (Staff Members, Regular Hours, Overtime Hours, Discrepancies)
Staff timesheet table with columns (Staff, Entries, Regular, OT, Double, Total, Breaks, Status)
TOTALS row calculation
Staff Dashboard -> Time Clock card navigation
Staff Dashboard -> My Schedule card navigation
Admin Dashboard -> Time Management card navigation
Admin Dashboard -> Staff Schedule card navigation
Back button navigation on all pages

tests: Staff cannot access kiosk devices list (403)
